title: DoIT Departmental Tech Support - Requesting Access to Licensed Software
body: Titles currently available to customers that require a license for use: Microsoft Project Standard and Professional 2024 Microsoft Visio Standard and Professional 2024 Licenses can be purchased via the Departmental Software Order Form . We recommend purchasing Standard edition of Project and/or Visio 2024 unless you require features that are only available in the Professional edition. Once a license has been purchased, contact support@doit.wisc.edu to request assistance installing your licensed software. Please include documentation of your license purchase and the name of the computer you would like the software installed on. See Also Buying Microsoft Project at UW-Madison Buying Microsoft Visio at UW-Madison
